---
title: "Diagram Embedding Examples"
description: "Reference page demonstrating all UIAO diagram embedding methods"
aspirational: true
---

## Method 1: HTML Comment Directive

Works in both `.md` and `.qmd` files. Option A (inject.py) resolves at pre-commit/CI time. Option B (Lua filter) resolves at Quarto render time.

### Full Form Factor (default)

<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_010 form_factor=full -->

### Nano Form Factor

<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_010 form_factor=nano -->

### With Custom Caption

<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_040 form_factor=full caption="Canon Governance Lifecycle" -->

## Method 2: Quarto Shortcode (`.qmd` only)

Native Quarto shortcode — best IDE support, cleanest syntax.

{{< uiao-diagram DIAG_020 >}}

{{< uiao-diagram DIAG_020 form_factor=nano >}}

{{< uiao-diagram DIAG_050 form_factor=full caption="Application Identity Model" >}}

## Method 3: Direct Image Reference

Manual reference — works everywhere but bypasses the pipeline.

![DIAG_001: Training Pipeline](../../diagrams/rendered/full/DIAG_001.svg "Training Pipeline")

## Diagram Registry Quick Reference

| Category | ID Range | Example |
|---|---|---|
| Training | DIAG_001–009 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_001 -->` |
| Architecture | DIAG_010–019 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_010 -->` |
| Testing | DIAG_020–029 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_020 -->` |
| Planning | DIAG_030–039 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_030 -->` |
| Governance | DIAG_040–049 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_040 -->` |
| Identity | DIAG_050–059 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_050 -->` |
| Operations | DIAG_060–069 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_060 -->` |
| Enforcement | DIAG_070–079 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_070 -->` |
| Data | DIAG_080–089 | `<!-- UIAO-DIAGRAM: DIAG_080 -->` |
